arts.ttl: Loris Karius 'considering retirement' as he opens up on major Liverpool errors
arts.sum: The former Reds' keeper has confessed he doesn't know if he'll play again after struggling to find a club six years on from his infamous part in Liverpool's Champions League final defeat to Real Madrid

arts.ttl: ‘Makes no sense’ – Icon not convinced by Liverpool transfer idea, player doesn’t fit in
arts.sum: Omar Marmoush joining Liverpool would make no sense as there’s not a position for him, and he’s not a direct replacement for Mohamed Salah. That’s according to Lothar Matthaus, speaking to SportBILD, who thinks Inter Milan would be a better destination than Liverpool for the Egyptian star. Marmoush has continued to earn admirers around Europe The post ‘Makes no sense’ – Icon not convinced by Liverpool transfer idea, player doesn’t fit in appeared first on Sport Witness.
